# displayedPropertyKeys

**Instance Property**

The [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Contacts/CNContact] property keys to display in the contact detail card.

## Declaration

```swift
var displayedPropertyKeys: [String]? { get set }
```

## Discussion

All the properties of the contact are displayed if this property is not set.
title: displayedPropertyKeys
